product: Configure the recovery period for dropped managed tables (Public Preview)
tagline: You can now configure the recovery period for dropped Unity Catalog managed tables.
what_it_does: You can now configure the recovery period for dropped Unity Catalog managed tables. By default, tables are recoverable for 7 days after being dropped using the UNDROP TABLE command. You can set the recovery period to 0 hours (to immediately purge dropped data) or between 7–30 days at the catalog or schema level.
why_it_matters: A longer period provides added protection against accidental drops of critical data, while a shorter period reduces cloud storage costs for workloads that frequently create and drop tables.
key_takeaway: You can now configure the recovery period for dropped Unity Catalog managed tables.
